name: Silly Billy
short_description: A horror survival game, where you explore an open-world town set in the Wild West, find and upgrade weapons and vehicles, and use them to beat an evil clown monster named Silly Billy.
detailed_description:
Billy was once a circus clown famous for his gun skills, but now his soul is trapped inside a huge clown in the box...

You are a bounty hunter who heard a legend about Silly Billy, a huge clown monster who was once the best shooter in his town. He performed in the circus, but when he died, his soul got trapped inside a huge clown in the box.

Explore an old western town, find weapons, try to kill the monster, and collect the juicy bounty that is on his head. But be careful! The old town is full of Billy's clowns who will try to stop you on your quest.
